title: Altenew 6th Anniversary Blog Hop!
excerpt: Hi friends - hope you’re staying healthy and safe! Although I have been a bit absent from this blog, I have been keeping up with sharing ideas and creativity on Instagram , YouTube , and newsletter . In light of…
body:
Hi friends - hope you’re staying healthy and safe! Although I have been a bit absent from this blog, I have been keeping up with sharing ideas and creativity on Instagram, YouTube, and newsletter. In light of current events, Altenew considered canceling the celebrations. However, through this blog hop, they wanted to spread joy and encourage others to be there for one another and give back during these uncertain and challenging times. Since we are staying safer at home in Los Angeles and have been since March 14, I wanted to create a project to hang in my studio or home as a reminder. It can easily be adapted to be a card as well.

Here’s a video showing in detail the project that I made using the new Artists’ Watercolors, Parlor Palm Die set and Watercolor Papers.

Some photos of the steps to get to the final project:

Prizes

Altenew is giving away a $50 gift certificate to 6 lucky winners and one Altenew Academy class to 10 lucky winners. There are also 14 awesome companies/crafty friends who are celebrating with us, and they are offering the following prizes:

Be sure to leave comments by 4/12/2020 for a chance to win one of 37 prizes! To make the hop more exciting, start your comment with "Hi from (city or country where you're from)!". 37 winners will be chosen at random from the comments left on any of the blogs listed below and will be announced on the Altenew Card Blog on 4/18/2020.

Also be sure to watch this video to learn more about how Altenew has donated 6K to relief organizations that are working to help vulnerable populations.

Special Offer

Enjoy FREE U.S. shipping with code HAPPY6TH or $5 OFF international shipping with code ANNIV20 at checkout. Offer valid from 4/2/2020 at 12:01 am EDT through 4/5/2020 at 11:59 pm EDT. Not valid on prior purchases. Cannot be combined with other promo codes. Shop here.
